nasb.text: Thus they shall eat those things by which atonement was made at their ordination and consecration; but a layman shall not eat them, because they are holy.

esv.text: They shall eat those things with which atonement was made at their ordination and consecration, but an outsider shall not eat of them, because they are holy.

cnv.text: 他們要吃那些用來贖罪的東西，好使他們可以接受聖職，可以成聖；只是外人不可吃，因為這些東西是聖物。

ccb.text: 他们要吃这些在授圣职时用来赎罪、使他们圣洁的祭物。但普通人不能吃，因为这些是圣物。
